title: Claimant's average weekly hours
p1: If the number of hours worked changed each week (for example, if they had a zero-hours contract), use the final 12 weeks of payslips to work out the weekly average.

avgWeeklyHrs.invalid: Enter average weekly hours in a valid format, for example 0, 10, 35 etc
avgWeeklyHrs.exceeded: Hours must be less than 168 (max number of hours in a week)
avgWeeklyHrs.notANumber: Hours worked in a week must be entered as a number, for example 0, 10, 35 etc.
avgWeeklyHrs.negativeNumber: Hours worked cannot be a negative value. It must be entered as a number, for example 0, 10, 35 etc.
